/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmodule2.so -o libmodule2.so CMakeFiles/module2.dir/src/argument.cpp.o CMakeFiles/module2.dir/src/client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/module2.dir/src/open62541.c.o CMakeFiles/module2.dir/src/object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/module2.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/module2.dir/src/variable.cpp.o  -lpthread
